zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Audley於1225年出生在英國爾保斯托時，她的父親Henry De Audley50歲，母親Bertrade Mainwaring28歲。她於1243年與William de Bostock在英國爾保斯托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1285年在她的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Audley于1225年出生在英国爾保斯托时，她的父亲Henry De Audley50岁，母亲Bertrade Mainwaring28岁。她于1243年与William de Bostock在英国爾保斯托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1285年在她的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Audley was born in 1225, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, her father, Henry De Audley, was 50 and her mother, Bertrade Mainwaring, was 28. She married William de Bostock in 1243, in Bostock, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1285, in her hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Audley est née en 1225, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry De Audley, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Bertrade Mainwaring, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William de Bostock en 1243, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1285, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Audley 1225 in Bostock, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry De Audley 50 und ihre Mutter Bertrade Mainwaring 28. Sie hat 1243 in Bostock, Cheshire, England William de Bostock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1285 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Audley è nata il nel 1225 nel Bostock, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Henry De Audley, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Bertrade Mainwaring, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William de Bostock nel 1243, nel Bostock, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1285, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Audley(이)가 1225년 영국 체실르 보스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry De Audley(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertrade Mainwaring(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1243년 영국 체실르 보스톡에서 William de Bostock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Audley nasceu em 1225, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry De Audley, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Bertrade Mainwaring, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Bostock em 1243, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1285, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Audley родилась в 1225 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry De Audley было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertrade Mainwaring, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Bostock в 1243 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1285 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Audley nació en 1225, en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry De Audley, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Bertrade Mainwaring, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William de Bostock en 1243, en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1285, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
